LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALMA CALDWELL MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD ( SCOTT BONAGOFSKY). ARGUED THRU IN-CAMERA SESSION IN THE JUDGE'S CHAMBER, AND FOR GOOD CAUSE, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF. ORDER SIGNED IN JUDGE'S CHAMBER. THE COURT ADVISED COUNSEL THAT THIS ORDER IS ONLY EFFECTIVE AFTER OBTAINING CONTINUANCE OF THE MARCH 24, 2006 HEARING RE STATUS CONFERENCE. THE COURT ORDERED THAT THE RECORDS OF THIS PROCEEDINGS BE SEALED AND CANNOT BE OPENED UNLESS ORDERED BY THE COURT. (302/REQ/JU-JT)BELDON YEE # 2647
